creator: kristinacors
caption: Where the Met Gala A listers actually stay and yes, you can book it too 👀 #luxuryhotels #wheretostayinnyc #metgalamonday #bestnychotels #thecarlyle

transcription.text: Let's talk about where the A-listers stay for the Met Gala. Met Gala Monday is upon us and everyone knows the main event is at the Met, but New York City hotels get all the behind-the-scenes action. And if you've ever wondered where all the A-listers are getting ready and putting together their iconic looks, this series is for you. One of the most iconic hotels is the Carlisle. This is the red carpet before the main red carpet and everyone from Hailey Bieber to Rosalia to Bad Bunny has been seen here on Met Gala night. The Carlisle isn't your average hotel, it's legendary. There have been so many priceless historic moments here like Princess Diana, Michael Jackson and Steve Jobs riding the elevator at the same time. The Carlisle has been the hotel of choice for Hollywood's elite since the 1930s. It's a 35-story, 192-room hotel offering guests a combination of discretion and grace. Rumor has it the hotel even had a hidden entrance to help Marilyn Monroe for her secret meetups with JFK. With history like this, it's easy to see why rooms start at $700 a night. Would you visit? Visit www.thevenusproject.com to learn more.
